pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires this exact directory path for the Python and Talon files.
Task description explicitly requires appending to this exact file path.
Task description explicitly lists these exact commands to map to the log_minutiae action.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create a custom Talon Voice package at "C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\fingerprint_logger" and output to "C:\Evidence\latent_report.csv". However, the task is completely defective. The required hook scripts "setup_task.ps1" and "export_result.ps1" (referenced in task.json) are entirely missing from the environment. Because "export_result.ps1" does not exist, "C:\tmp\task_result.json" is never generated, causing the verifier.py script to perpetually fail to verify anything.
